mapper.insert: INSERT INTO forum_posts (user_id, title, content, category, status, is_pinned, view_count, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{category}, #{status}, #{pinned}, #{viewCount}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
INSERT INTO forum_post_images (post_id, image_url, sort_order, status, created_at) VALUES (#{postId}, #{imageUrl}, #{sortOrder}, #{status}, #{createdAt})
mapper.sql: p.id, p.user_id, p.title, p.content, p.category, p.status, p.is_pinned AS pinned, p.view_count, p.handled_by, p.handled_at, p.created_at, p.updated_at, u.nickname AS author_nickname, u.avatar AS author_avatar, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM forum_replies r WHERE r.post_id = p.id AND r.status = 'normal') AS reply_count
mapper.select: SELECT FROM forum_posts p JOIN users u ON u.id = p.user_id WHERE p.id = #{id}

SELECT FROM forum_posts p JOIN users u ON u.id = p.user_id
p.status = #{status} AND p.category = #{category}
AND (p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY p.is_pinned DESC, p.created_at DESC, p.id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE forum_posts SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'normal'
UPDATE forum_posts SET status = 'deleted', is_pinned = 0, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'normal'
UPDATE forum_posts SET status = #{status}, handled_by = #{operatorId}, handled_at = NOW(), is_pinned = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'normal' THEN is_pinned ELSE 0 END WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE forum_posts SET is_pinned = #{pinned}, handled_by = #{operatorId}, handled_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'normal'
UPDATE forum_post_images SET status = #{status} WHERE post_id = #{postId}
